digest.component_or_area: CI config-check drift gate (compose volume provisioning)
propositions: A CI gate must ensure every external:true volume in docker-compose.yml is provisioned by compose-up.sh so drift cannot reach main.
compose-up.sh must hoist the duplicated subdir list into one SITE_SUBDIRS variable with a shared volume-name derivation helper used by both provisioning loops and the new --print-volumes mode.
A side-effect-free --print-volumes mode must print derived external volume names before any docker/dnf/systemctl side effects and exit 0.
config-check.sh check 5 must extract external:true volumes via python3 yaml.safe_load and compare against compose-up.sh --print-volumes output, failing on non-zero exit or empty output.
An embedded self-test with a synthetic gerrit_notprovisioned fixture must prove the drift check detects the missing volume, naming it and compose-up.sh.
This change depends on the compose-up.sh provisioning fix landing first and is rolled out as a stacked Gerrit change to keep main never failing the gate.
